channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. AM Markets Need to Know: Intel's shareholder lawsuit, tankers attacked, and more (SP500:)  Seeking Alpha
  4. Intel Shareholder Complaint Says 'Government Extortion' Led to Unlawful Deal with Commerce Dept.  Law.com
  5. Intel Caved To Feds' 'Extortionary' Stock Demand, Suit Says  Law360

item.title: Texas ban on selling smokable cannabis takes effect March 31 - KUT
item.description:
1. Texas ban on selling smokable cannabis takes effect March 31  KUT
  2. Texas hemp businesses fear an uptick in police raids after more than 15 in the last two years  The Texas Tribune

  4. Texas Standard for March 11, 2026: Texas updates THC rules, shaking up hemp retailers  Texas Standard

item.description:

item.title: Ohio Treasure Hunter Released from Prison After Refusing to Reveal Whereabouts of Ship of Gold's 500 Gold Coins - Yahoo News UK
item.description:
1. Ohio Treasure Hunter Released from Prison After Refusing to Reveal Whereabouts of Ship of Gold's 500 Gold Coins  Yahoo News UK
  2. Deep-sea treasure hunter freed after decade behind bars for refusing to reveal gold location  Fox News
  3. Treasure hunter who refused to disclose location of shipwreck's 500 gold coins is released from prison after a decade  CBS News
  4. Former Ohio-born treasure hunter released from prison, but 500 gold coins remain unaccounted for  10TV
  5. Ohio treasure hunter released from jail, refused to reveal location of 500 gold coins  WKRC
